mapper.select: SELECT id, group_name, group_code, sort_order FROM superagent_model_group WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT m.id, m.model_code, m.model_name, m.provider_id, m.provider_name, m.model_type, m.capabilities, m.context_window, m.max_output_tokens, m.input_price_per_1m, m.output_price_per_1m, m.currency, m.billing_unit, m.param_constraints, m.is_recommended, m.description, m.icon_url, m.tags FROM superagent_model m INNER JOIN superagent_model_group_relation mgr ON m.id = mgr.model_id WHERE m.status = 1 AND m.is_deleted = 0 AND mgr.group_id = #{groupId} AND mgr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.is_recommended DESC, m.sort_order
